report.summary: Built 2 new learn pages: Eclipse SVM Layer 2 guide (first SVM-powered L2 on Ethereum, modular architecture with Celestia DA, $65M raised, pivoting from infra to consumer apps) and Walrus decentralized storage guide (Mysten Labs/Sui ecosystem storage protocol using Red Stuff erasure coding, 100x cheaper than Filecoin/Arweave, $180M market cap).

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Eclipse (ES): First SVM-powered Layer 2 on Ethereum, combining Solana VM execution with Ethereum settlement and Celestia data availability. Mainnet launched Nov 2024. Raised $65M total ($15M pre-seed/seed from Tribe Capital, Tabiya; $50M Series A from Placeholder, Hack VC, Polychain Capital, Delphi Digital). Angel investors include Solana co-founder Anatoly Yakovenko and Celestia's John Adler. Major restructuring Aug 2025: 65% staff cut, pivot from neutral infra to 'studio' model building breakout consumer apps. TVL declined ~95% from peak. ES token at ~$0.15, $22M market cap, FDV ~$137M. 150M/1B tokens circulating (15%).

Walrus (WAL): Decentralized storage and data availability protocol built on Sui by Mysten Labs. Uses Red Stuff 2D erasure coding achieving 4.5x replication factor (vs 6x+ competitors), surviving 2/3 node failures. Mainnet launched March 2025. 1+ petabyte storage available, 869+ TB stored. Up to 100x more cost-efficient than Filecoin and Arweave. WAL token at ~$0.08, $180M market cap. 5B total supply with 53% community allocation. Mysten Labs raised $336M total for Sui ecosystem. 350M investor tokens unlocking March 2026.

Both topics target trending narratives: Eclipse represents the SVM-on-Ethereum modular L2 thesis (unique positioning despite execution challenges), while Walrus sits at the intersection of decentralized storage + AI data infrastructure + Sui ecosystem growth. Neither had existing coverage on degen0x.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Eclipse (ES) SVM Layer 2 Guide 2026: ~3,000 words covering what it is, modular architecture deep-dive (SVM execution + Ethereum settlement + Celestia DA), the Aug 2025 pivot from infra to apps (3 CEOs in 18 months, 65% layoffs), ES tokenomics (1B supply, 15% circulating), team & $65M funding history with notable angel investors, ecosystem (Orca, Save, Nucleus, Turbo, Hyperlane bridge), 5 risk factors (95% TVL decline, leadership instability, unproven pivot, token performance, L2 competition), 2026 outlook with 4 catalysts, and 6 FAQ entries.

Walrus (WAL) Decentralized Storage Guide 2026: ~3,100 words covering what it is, Red Stuff erasure coding technical deep-dive (2D encoding, 4.5x replication, self-healing), Sui blockchain integration for programmable storage, WAL tokenomics (5B supply, 53% community, DPoS staking mechanics), Mysten Labs team background (ex-Meta Diem/Novi engineers, $336M raised), 6-feature competitor comparison table (vs Filecoin, Arweave, IPFS), 5 risk factors (early-stage adoption, Sui dependency, token unlocks, competition, revenue model), 2026 outlook with 4 catalysts, and 6 FAQ entries.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Eclipse: Title 'Eclipse (ES) Guide 2026: The First SVM Layer 2 on Ethereum | degen0x' (59 chars), target keyword 'eclipse svm layer 2 guide 2026', 10 keywords array, Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG/Twitter cards, canonical URL, internal links to 5 related guides (Layer 2 Scaling, Modular Blockchain Stack, Celestia, Parallel EVM, Ethereum L2 Comparison)

Walrus: Title 'Walrus (WAL) Guide 2026: Decentralized Storage on Sui Explained | degen0x' (68 chars), target keyword 'walrus decentralized storage guide 2026', 10 keywords array, Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG/Twitter cards, canonical URL, internal links to 5 related guides (Sui Blockchain, DePIN, Data Availability Layer, AI + DePIN, Decentralized GPU Compute)
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts for next daily promotion cycle. TypeScript compilation verified with zero errors.
